CVE-2012-3368.title: Integer signedness error in attach.c in dtach 0.8 allows remote a ...
CVE-2012-3368.description: Integer signedness error in attach.c in dtach 0.8 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information from daemon stack memory in opportunistic circumstances by reading application data after an improper connection-close request, as demonstrated by running an IRC client in dtach.
